sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_column VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_table SET text_column = regexp_replace(text_column, '[aeiou]', '-') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexp_replace(text_column, 'world', 'DuckDB') AS modified_text FROM test_table;
SELECT id, regexp_replace(text_column, '[lo]', '-') AS modified_text FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
